encounters.trigger: Triggering the silent alarm forces the sector lockdown to initiate.
encounters.hazard: Falling debris from unstable holographic billboards.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone triggers the secondary ventilation purge, opening the path to the server room.
encounters.hazard: Superheated steam pipes venting at random intervals.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the android unlocks the restricted elevator leading to the CEO penthouse.

pickup.name: Neural Bypass Chip
pickup.effect: Allows interaction with the boss's internal firewall.

encounters.hazard: Electric floor grids that cycle every three seconds.

output.objective: Assassinate the CEO and wipe the city's debt database.

boss.name: Cyber-Tyrant Arasaka
boss.victory_condition: Disable the firewall and land a final strike before the building self-destructs.

output.reward: The liberation of the lower-city districts and a legendary stealth augmentation.

encounters.trigger: Destroying the drone reveals a decrypted data packet directing you to the mainframe entrance.
Deactivating the Sentinel unlocks the path to the Core Terminal.
The Cyborg collapses, dropping the master override key needed to engage the Central AI.

pickup.name: Master Override Key
pickup.effect: Exposes the Core AI's cooling system.

output.objective: Infiltrate the Neural Core and purge the sentient virus.

boss.name: Central AI Prime
boss.victory_condition: Use the override key to lower heat shields then strike the cooling core.

pickup.effect: Allows the player to parry boss energy attacks.

output.objective: Infiltrate the mega-corporation and stabilize the timeline.

boss.name: Aion the Corrupt
boss.victory_condition: Reflect the boss's ultimate time-shattering blast back at him using the module.

output.reward: The Chronos Key: grants ability to pause time for 5 seconds.

encounters.trigger: Defeating the drone releases a static charge that unlocks the data gate.
Shattering the bot reveals a frequency key for the main spire.

pickup.name: Frequency Tuner
pickup.effect: Allows player to resonate with heavy metallic shields.

encounters.trigger: Purifying the sprite drops a Master Override Chip.

pickup.name: Master Override Chip
pickup.effect: Used to disable the final boss's primary defense.

output.objective: Restore the city's whimsical energy flow.

boss.name: The Glitch-Witch of Silicon Valley
boss.victory_condition: Use the chip to force a factory reset on her mainframe.

output.reward: The ability to summon glitter-infused lightning bolts.
